details.frame_sampler: fastvideo tensor->PIL, np.linspace at infer_fps*duration (~10 frames for 5s clip); upstream vs2_inference.py uses qwen_vl_utils path-based sampler which picks slightly different frames — same model, ~1-soft-score difference on the physics dim is the residual gap.
